title: lichen_link_strerror missing newline cases
description:
Location: firmware/bridge-zephyr/subsys/lichen/lichen_util.h:99-131

Several errno values used in the codebase are not covered by lichen_link_strerror():
- ENODATA (used in main.c:89)
- ESPC (suggested for truncation handling)

What goes wrong: When these error codes are passed to lichen_link_strerror(), they return "unknown error" rather than a descriptive string. This reduces debuggability.

Note: The existing code documents covered errors in the docstring, but the docstring should stay in sync with actual usage.
